pages.text: The $(item)Piglin Trading Post Skyseed$() — blackstone, gold and netherrack. The Nether's village: a blackstone hall around a $(item)gold$() trade pillar where 3-5 piglins barter. $(bold)Drop them gold$().$(br2)$(bold)Where to look$()$(br)Blackstone from a Nether-thrown $(item)Rocky$() isle, gold from nether gold ore or a $(item)Badlands$(), netherrack from any Nether foothold.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.

The Nether's $(bold)trading post$() — a blackstone hall set adrift: an open colonnade around a $(item)gold$() trade pillar, lit by hanging lanterns, with $(item)gilded blackstone$() and two loot chests. Three to five $(bold)piglins$() keep it.

Wear gold and they stay neutral; $(bold)drop a gold ingot$() near one and it barters. The gold-economy hub. Nether-native, and best thrown there — though a topside throw won't go entirely to waste… Crafted from blackstone, gold and $(item)netherrack$().
